threads.title: Digital Art by @m0dest___ — On-Chain Games, Prompts & More
threads.summary: A 14-part guided tour through m0dest’s digital practice: playable systems, prompt-based works, on-chain experiments and the ideas that connect them.
threads.excerpt: Suzanne opens with a simple invitation: ‘Let’s talk digital art by @m0dest___.’ The thread follows the work across formats while keeping the artist’s conceptual through-line in view.
highlights: A work-by-work path through a practice that treats interaction as material.
Attention to how prompts, rules and player decisions can become part of an artwork.
Direct routes from the commentary to the artist’s wider oeuvre and primary profiles.

threads.title: Systems in Motion — DisruptedStar
threads.summary: A placeholder archive entry for a future Suzanne thread examining coded movement, organic diffusion and long-form generative systems.
threads.excerpt: This editorial placeholder demonstrates how a sourced thread will appear once its original X URL and notes are verified.
highlights: Chronological context for a multi-year generative practice.
Links out to the artist’s aggregated Raster oeuvre.
Clearly marked placeholder status until an original Suzanne thread is supplied.

threads.title: The Image as Signal — XCOPY
threads.summary: A sample entry showing how the archive can connect a Suzanne thread to an artist’s complete cross-platform record.
threads.excerpt: A compact editorial record for glitch, repetition and the visual grammar of crypto-native art. Replace with the verified thread text when available.
highlights: A concise reading of recurring motifs and motion.
Primary-source links kept beside archive commentary.
One-click access to the artist’s Raster profile.

threads.title: Pixels, Systems & Networked Colour — Kim Asendorf
threads.summary: A placeholder for a future sourced reading of Kim Asendorf’s browser-native, pixel-based and generative work.
threads.excerpt: Built to demonstrate multi-tag discovery and the artist-to-thread relationship in the archive.
highlights: Browser-native art as both image and system.
A navigable link between an artist dossier and every thread mention.
Reference-first presentation with clear source status.

artists.name: m0dest
artists.context: An interdisciplinary digital artist working with games, prompts, interactive systems and on-chain media.

artists.name: DisruptedStar
artists.context: A generative artist whose Raster record spans Organic Diffusion, Voyager, DisOrder and earlier Tezos series.

artists.name: XCOPY
artists.context: A defining crypto artist known for looping animation, glitch aesthetics and stark studies of digital anxiety.

artists.name: Kim Asendorf
artists.context: A conceptual media artist whose work spans generative systems, pixels, browser-native art and network culture.
